---
name: Crawl Target / Training Report
about: Report a new crawl target or training result
title: "[Target] "
labels: training
assignees: ''
---

## Target URL

The URL or site you want to crawl or have tested.

## Goal

What data do you want to extract? Example: "collect product titles and prices".

## Current Behavior

What happens when you try this target today? Include any errors or partial results.

## Expected Outcome

What a successful crawl should look like.

## Site Notes

- Is the site static HTML, JS-rendered, or API-backed?
- Does it require login or have anti-bot protection?
- Any pagination or infinite scroll?

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Crawler-Mind version or commit: [e.g., main @ abc1234]
